name: Moroccan Chicken Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Fresh jalapeno pepper, seeded and minced
2 Whole chicken breasts, skinned, boned, cut into 1-1/2-inch chunks
2 small Carrots, sliced diagonally into 1/4-inch thick pieces
1/2 Acorn squash, seeded and pared, cut into 1/2-inch dice
1 medium Zucchini, scrubbed, cut into 1/2-inch dice
14 oz Whole tomatoes, coarsely chopped, liquid reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine oil, jalapeno, coriander, cumin, and cinnamon. Add chicken and toss to coat. Let stand, stirring frequently for 30 minutes.
2. In a 3-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine carrots, onion, and acorn squash. Cover with lid and microcook on HIGH power for 5 minutes. Add 1 cup broth, zucchini, tomatoes with liquid, and raisins; microcook covered for 3 minutes. Remove from oven and stir. Microcook covered for another 5 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking. Stir in chicken with marinade and microcook covered for 3 more minutes. Stir in chick-peas, 1/2 cup broth, and salt; microcook covered for 2 additional minutes.
3. In a medium saucepan, heat remaining 2 cups broth and butter to boiling. Stir in couscous, cover the pan, and remove from heat. Let stand for 5 minutes.
4. To serve, spoon couscous onto a serving platter. Top with chicken stew and sprinkle with almonds and mint.
